name: acen_local_analytic
description: ACEN stage-conformance, Mode.Local (task 0342 Phase 3): a single CONNECTED 3-face cluster (an L-shaped tri-quad region, deliberately NOT the full top-face rectangle) on a segments-2 cube's top face. Chosen specifically so Local's cluster-AVERAGE-of-face-centroids formula numerically DIVERGES from Select's bbox-center formula on the same selection -- proving the two modes are wired to distinct code paths rather than one silently reusing the other's result.
source: Analytic -- hand-derived from vibe3d's own documented ActionCenterStage formula (source/toolpipe/stages/actcenter.d: Mode.Local averages the face centroids of the faces in cluster 0, cluster membership from the connected-component BFS over the selected faces), NOT captured from any reference editor (no live probe exists for this mode -- see the 0342 task log Phase 0 disposition: Local is idle-eval-equivalent and was already numerically verified fixed by an earlier commit). Cross-checked against a live vibe3d run at authoring time (GET /api/toolpipe/eval after the same mesh_build/selection/pipe_setup below returned actionCenter.center == [-0.083333, 0.5, -0.083333] and type==4, and actr.select on the IDENTICAL selection returned the bbox center [0, 0.5, 0] -- confirming the two formulas genuinely diverge on this selection rather than coincide.

provenance.harness: hand-derived from source/toolpipe/stages/actcenter.d, cross-checked live at authoring time
provenance.notes: Mode.Local formula derivation; cross-checked against a live vibe3d run at authoring time (not a reference-editor capture).

mesh_build.argstring: prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:2 segmentsY:2 segmentsZ:2 radius:0
